title: Awesome Guns
description: A plugin that adds custom guns to minecraft spigot servers in 1.21.1
body:
Awesome Guns is my 2nd minecraft plugin which adds new guns and other custom items to the game. 

  Why you should I use Awesome guns? Awesome Guns adds multiple new guns that don't replace pre existing items and is fully compatible with other gun plugins such as QualityArmory. 

   How to use? just drag the .jar into your plugins folder them open up the game and as long as your op you can use /ag (item) to get the items a list of all the commands should be in the changelog.

   You can get the resource pack here https://modrinth.com/project/hNpbL5EG.

   If find a bug please report it to my discord.

   For more info on the plugin you can go into my discord or watch a video [https://www.youtube.com/@might2you](https://www.youtube.com/@might2you)
